title: Coffee with Friends
content: On Sunday afternoon, Lily met two friends at their favorite coffee shop. The café was warm and smelled like fresh pastries. They ordered cappuccinos and sat near the window talking for hours. One friend shared stories about a recent vacation, while another talked about a new job. Lily laughed often and enjoyed the relaxed atmosphere. Outside, people walked slowly through the streets under the afternoon sun. Before leaving, they promised to meet again next weekend. Moments like these always made Lily feel happy and connected.
